message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "weaviate-3513-fr-add-a-containsnone-operator",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "weaviate: FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator",
+    "description": "FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator. Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current weaviate deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your weaviate version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nhelm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working weaviate installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review weaviate configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate\n```\nBuilding on the work of #2387 and #3319 we can now support a `ContainsNone` array operator."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator",
+        "description": "### What's being changed:\n\nAdded a ContainsNone operator which is internally implemented by `AND`s of multiple `NotEquals` Operations.\r\n\n### Review checklist\n```yaml\n{\n  title: \"Braveheart\",\n  director: \"Mel Gibson\",\n  languages: [\"English\", \"French\", \"Latin\", \"Scottish Gaelic\"],\n  ...\n},{\n  title: \"A Prophet\",\n  director: \"Mel Gibson\",\n  languages: [\"French\", \"Arabic\", \"Corsican\"],\n  ...\n},\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What's being changed:\n\nAdded a ContainsNone operator which is internally implemented by `AND`s of multiple `NotEquals` Operations.\r\n\n### Review checklist",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  title: \"Braveheart\",\n  director: \"Mel Gibson\",\n  languages: [\"English\", \"French\", \"Latin\", \"Scottish Gaelic\"],\n  ...\n},{\n  title: \"A Prophet\",\n  director: \"Mel Gibson\",\n  languages: [\"French\", \"Arabic\", \"Corsican\"],\n  ...\n},",
+        "{\n   path: [\"languages\"]\n   operator: ContainsNone\n   valueText: [\"English\", \"German\"]\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
